lsit.torso_verticality: Grow tall between your shoulders and keep your chest lifted.
lsit.legs_horizontality: Your legs should be perfectly parallel to the floor.
lsit.leg_height: Your heels should be on the same line as your hips.
lsit.hip_height_symmetry: Keep your hips level: don’t let one side drop.
lsit.knee_height_symmetry: Keep both knees at the same height.
lsit.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
lsit.knee_angle_symmetry: Lock both knees in the same way.
lsit.left_elbow_lockout: Push hard through your left hand and lock the elbow.
lsit.right_elbow_lockout: Push hard through your right hand and lock the elbow.

handstand.body_verticality: Stack hands, shoulders, hips and toes in a single line.
handstand.stack_alignment: Push the floor and align wrists, shoulders, hips and ankles.
handstand.wrist_height_symmetry: Keep both wrists at the same height.
handstand.shoulder_height_symmetry: Keep both shoulders at the same height.
handstand.hip_height_symmetry: Keep both hips at the same height.
handstand.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
handstand.knee_angle_symmetry: Keep your legs straight and symmetrical.
handstand.left_hip_extension: Reach your left leg higher for a cleaner line.
handstand.right_hip_extension: Reach your right leg higher for a cleaner line.

planche.shoulder_ankle_horizontality: Aim for a straight, horizontal line from shoulders to ankles.
planche.hip_on_line: Don’t break at the hips: bring them back into the line of your body.
planche.shoulder_height_symmetry: Keep both shoulders at the same height.
planche.hip_height_symmetry: Keep both hips at the same height.
planche.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
planche.elbow_angle_symmetry: Lock both elbows in the same way.
planche.knee_angle_symmetry: Lock both knees in the same way.
planche.left_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the left leg for a cleaner line.
planche.right_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the right leg for a cleaner line.
planche.left_hip_extension: Push the left leg further to fully open the hip.
planche.right_hip_extension: Push the right leg further to fully open the hip.

front_lever.shoulder_ankle_horizontality: Aim for a straight, horizontal line from shoulders to ankles.
front_lever.hip_on_line: Don’t break at the hips: bring them back into the line of your body.
front_lever.shoulder_height_symmetry: Keep both shoulders at the same height.
front_lever.hip_height_symmetry: Keep both hips at the same height.
front_lever.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
front_lever.elbow_angle_symmetry: Lock both elbows in the same way.
front_lever.knee_angle_symmetry: Lock both knees in the same way.
front_lever.left_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the left leg for a cleaner line.
front_lever.right_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the right leg for a cleaner line.
front_lever.left_hip_extension: Push the left leg further to fully open the hip.
front_lever.right_hip_extension: Push the right leg further to fully open the hip.

back_lever.shoulder_ankle_horizontality: Aim for a straight, horizontal line from shoulders to ankles.
back_lever.hip_on_line: Don’t break at the hips: bring them back into the line of your body.
back_lever.shoulder_height_symmetry: Keep both shoulders at the same height.
back_lever.hip_height_symmetry: Keep both hips at the same height.
back_lever.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
back_lever.elbow_angle_symmetry: Lock both elbows in the same way.
back_lever.knee_angle_symmetry: Lock both knees in the same way.
back_lever.left_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the left leg for a cleaner line.
back_lever.right_knee_lockout: Fully straighten the right leg for a cleaner line.
back_lever.left_hip_extension: Push the left leg further to fully open the hip.
back_lever.right_hip_extension: Push the right leg further to fully open the hip.

elbow_lever.shoulder_ankle_horizontality: Lift your hips to recover a horizontal line.
elbow_lever.hip_on_line: Avoid breaking at the hips: bring them back into the line of your body.
elbow_lever.hip_height_symmetry: Keep both hips at the same height.
elbow_lever.knee_height_symmetry: Keep both knees at the same height.
elbow_lever.ankle_height_symmetry: Keep both ankles at the same height.
elbow_lever.knee_angle_symmetry: Lock both legs in the same way to avoid a crooked line.

human_flag.shoulder_ankle_horizontality: Lift your whole body to form a clear horizontal line.
human_flag.hip_on_line: Don’t let your hips sag: bring them back into the flag line.
human_flag.leg_axis_parallelism: Squeeze your legs and keep them perfectly parallel.
human_flag.leg_stacking_on_axis: Stack your legs on a single line.
human_flag.arm_mirror_symmetry: Balance the push from the bottom arm and the pull from the top arm.
human_flag.bottom_arm_lockout: Push hard with the bottom arm and fully lock the elbow.
human_flag.top_arm_lockout: Lock the top arm without letting it bend.
